mapper.insert: INSERT INTO movies (movieid, title, description, releasedate, runtime, posterimage) VALUES (#{movieId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{releaseDate}, #{runtime}, #{posterImage})
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, ROUND(AVG(score), 1) AS averageScore FROM movies m left JOIN reviews r ON m.movieId = r.movieId GROUP BY m.movieId ORDER BY averageScore DESC
SELECT * FROM movies WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%') ORDER BY averageScore DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE movies SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, releasedate = #{releaseDate}, runtime = #{runtime}, posterimage = #{posterImage} WHERE movieid = #{movieId}
